description.value: Price 40,000 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint divination and evocation DESCRIPTION When lit, this hooded lantern shines brightly in a 60-foot radius, as daylight. Once per day as a swift action, if the owner is a good-aligned divine spellcaster, she can intensify the lantern’s light for 1 hour. This intensified light dazzles evil outsiders and undead in the area, and evil incorporeal creatures take 75% damage from magical attacks instead of 50%. If an illuminated creature or object has a mark indicating evil allegianceâsuch as a demoniac’s demonic markâthat mark glow brilliantly, shining through anything short of magical concealments. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells daylight, detect evil; Special creator must worship a good god or goddess, usually one that represents light or brilliance; Cost 20,000 gp
